title: mapania johorensis
intro: Mapania johorensis, also known as the Johore Mapania, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asia for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce pain, inflammation, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Mapania johorensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to clean wounds and promote healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the plant are often dried and used to make tea or infused in hot water as a decoction to utilize its medicinal properties.
